violations.text: Hot water was not available on the mobile unit. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The vegetable sink, located at the Adolf Meyer kitchen needs an air gap. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The following was observed: 1) The mixer bowl of stand mixer was observed to be in poor repair (dents). 2) Strainers were observed to be in poor repair (frayed edges). PIC disposed of equipment at the time of inspection. All equipment must be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the smaller stand mixer had an accumulation of food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

A sanitizer spray bottle was stored on the side of the sink in the food prep area. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above/next to food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Chemicals moved to proper storage area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

Glue traps were observed with an accumulation of dead roaches in the ware-washing and dry storage area. Dead or trapped birds, insects, rodents, and other pests shall be removed from control devices and the PREMISES at a frequency that prevents their accumulation, decomposition, or the attraction of pests. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

The spikes and sides of the metal grip of the slicer was observed to be worn down/scratched. The food contact equipment must be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2023

The following equipment was observed not in good repair: 1.knife was chipped at top of blade. 2.several metal whisks were broken and missing pieces. 3.a floor grate in the kitchen were broken. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2023

The following physical facilities were is in poor repair: 1.coving was missing and/or not intact with wall and floor junctures in the walk in cooler. 2.door handles to walk in cooler was loose. 3.cracked floor tiles in walk in cooler. 4.missing light bulbs over stoves. 5.hole in wall near 3 bay sink area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2023
The floors in the back storage area was observed with broken glass. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2023
